---
title: "BioInfo-Scientist Manuscript Draft"
author:
  - name: "Your Name"
    affiliations: [1]
affiliations:
  - id: 1
    name: "Your Institution"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
bibliography: ../literature/bib/library.bib
---

# Abstract

TODO

# Introduction

{{< include sections/introduction.qmd >}}

# Methods

{{< include sections/methods.qmd >}}

# Results

{{< include sections/results.qmd >}}

# Discussion

{{< include sections/discussion.qmd >}}

# Data and code availability

TODO

# AI use disclosure

AI-assisted tools were used for code generation, debugging, workflow organization, internal consistency checks, and language editing. All scientific claims, analyses, citations, figures, and conclusions were verified by the human authors.

# References
